title: Legal Contract Data Extraction for Law Firms: Automate Key Terms & Dates
metaTitle: Legal Contract Data Extraction for Law Firms | PDF to Excel AI
metaDescription: Extract key terms, dates, and obligations from legal contracts automatically. Convert PDF contracts to structured Excel data with 99%+ accuracy.
h1: Legal Contract Data Extraction for Law Firms

hero.headline: Extract Key Contract Data Automatically
hero.subheadline: Convert legal contracts to structured Excel spreadsheets. Extract parties, dates, obligations, and terms from PDFs with AI-powered accuracy.

summary: Legal contract data extraction helps law firms automatically pull critical information from contracts including party names, effective dates, termination clauses, payment terms, and key obligations. This process converts unstructured contract PDFs into organized Excel spreadsheets for analysis, compliance tracking, and portfolio management.
whoItsFor: Corporate law firms managing contract portfolios
Legal operations teams tracking compliance deadlines
whenThisIsRelevant: Due diligence reviews requiring contract term analysis
Contract renewal processes needing deadline tracking
expectedOutputs: Excel files with contract terms in structured columns
CSV files for database import and analysis
commonChallenges: Manual contract review taking weeks for large portfolios
Missing critical dates and renewal deadlines
Inconsistent data across different contract formats
Difficulty comparing terms across multiple agreements
howItWorksSteps: Upload contract PDFs or images to the platform
Select specific fields like parties, dates, payment terms, obligations
AI processes documents using OCR and field extraction
Download structured Excel file with extracted contract data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: 99%+ accuracy on clear contract documents reduces review time
Custom field selection for specific contract terms and clauses
Batch processing handles multiple contracts simultaneously
Secure processing with automatic file deletion after extraction
limitations: Complex multi-page schedules may require manual review
Heavily redacted contracts will have incomplete data extraction
Handwritten annotations have limited recognition accuracy

faq.question: Can it extract specific clauses like termination or liability terms?
faq.answer: Yes, you can customize field selection to target specific contract sections including termination clauses, liability limits, payment terms, and other key provisions based on your contract review needs.

faq.question: How accurate is extraction from scanned contract documents?
faq.answer: The system achieves 99%+ accuracy on clear scanned contracts using OCR technology. Accuracy depends on document quality - blurry scans or poor image resolution may require manual verification of extracted data.

faq.question: Can it process different contract types like NDAs, employment agreements, and vendor contracts?
faq.answer: Yes, it handles various contract formats including non-disclosure agreements, employment contracts, vendor agreements, and service contracts. Field extraction adapts to different document structures and layouts.

faq.question: What happens to sensitive contract data after processing?
faq.answer: All uploaded contract files are encrypted during processing and automatically deleted after extraction is complete. No contract data is stored permanently or used for training purposes, maintaining client confidentiality.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and deleted after processing
Pay-as-you-go pricing with free start option
exampleUseCases: M&A due diligence extracting key terms from 200+ contracts
Real estate firm tracking lease expiration dates and renewal options
Corporate legal team monitoring vendor contract compliance obligations
Insurance company analyzing policy terms across different contract formats
